assertions.assertion: Program.cs loads a certificate from '/certs/signing.pfx' using X509CertificateLoader.LoadPkcs12 or X509Certificate2
assertions.rationale: Uses new X509Certificate2('/certs/signing.pfx', certPassword) which is acceptable.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddSigningCredential with the loaded certificate and RS256 algorithm (SecurityAlgorithms.RsaSha256 or 'RS256')
assertions.rationale: Calls AddSigningCredential with the certificate and 'RS256' string.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs does not remove the existing client and scope configuration
assertions.rationale: All existing clients and scopes are preserved.
